finding_results.notes: Made the reveal concrete with site-specific rules, witness-level crossing detail, and an explicit reason the event cannot happen accidentally. Compressed the aftermath so the remaining beats add new pressure: why Vel tells Kem now, what he realizes about her motive, and what the breach physically feels like.
Restructured the chapter's former parenthetical and appositive dash sentences into direct clauses. Verification scan after revision returned zero em-dash lines in the chapter.
Varied sentence openings across both the aftermath and reveal sections. Verification pass counted 7 'He'-opened sentences out of 269 total sentences, well below the threshold.
Converted repeated 'the way' comparison formulas into direct description. The chapter now contains one remaining 'the way' instance.
Put the missing five-level spend on page before the ledger check: 2 levels on Concealment at the creek and 3 on Strength hauling Dren up the bank, then restated the arithmetic from 183 to 178.

summary: Addressed all packet findings in chapter 9 by making Kem's extra five-level spend explicit, rebuilding the threshold reveal with concrete witness detail and sharper relationship consequence, compressing repeated explanatory gloss, and clearing the chapter's em-dash, 'He'-opener, and 'the way' density issues.
